message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for Log primitive

Add 22 oracle tests for Log primitive covering:
- Special values (1, e, 2, 10)
- Domain boundaries (0, negative, very small/large)
- Mathematical properties: product, quotient, power rules
- Log-exp inverse relationship
- Monotonicity
- Complex numbers including log(-1) = iπ
- 1D/2D tensor shapes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
